examples: 225by a periphrastic version of the general text.
John is making a periphrastic study in a worn-out poetical fashion.
The English and Chinese language are of different language typology, but languages contain periphrastic and lexical causative sentences.
It would be pipatum, the noise made by Catullus's girlfriend's sparrow, but for some reason the Vatican insists on using a periphrastic construction of three long words.
